title: Obsessed
tmdbOverview: A secret, passionate affair happens in the summer of 1969 between Colonel Jin Pyeong, trapped in a loveless marriage with Soo Jin, and Jong Ga Heun, the Chinese-Korean wife of Captain Kyung Woo Jin.
synopsis: Obsessed (2014) is a drama, romance and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
